_schema_note: Per-repo sidecar tier overrides for stage_formal_docs.py. Each top-level key is a short repo name (matching setup_repos.sh). Values map the staged filename (post-conversion: .rst -> .txt, .html -> .txt) to a sidecar entry. A bare integer is shorthand for {"tier": N}. Unknown filenames warn but do not fail. v1.5.1 Item 1.1 — briefing minimum for virtio: virtio.txt Tier 1, virtio-spec-behavioral-contracts.md Tier 1, writing_virtio_drivers.txt Tier 2.
